sections.headline: An agentic CMS to structure and scale modern experiences.
sections.description: Create and deliver high-performance experiences faster — built for agility and optimized for AI-driven discovery.

media.description: Static product UI render, right column. Decorative — copy inside the mockup is illustrative and not part of page content.

sections.headline: Discover Agents in Adobe Experience Manager
Explore the features and capabilities of Adobe Experience Manager Sites.
sections.description: Digital experience has evolved — your CMS should too. Experience Manager Sites addresses the core challenges of managing your digital properties, leveraging powerful agentic execution to help teams create, update, and activate experiences more efficiently. The result: structured, high-performing pages designed for both human engagement and AI visibility.

tab_content.title: Accelerate content creation with agentic capabilities.
tab_content.body: Give marketers the ability to quickly create, update, and scale digital experiences faster with flexible authoring tools and built-in agentic support.
bullets: Modernize legacy content and use agentic workflows to automate updates, enforce governance and streamline optimization across sites.
Use flexible authoring to create and publish content directly from Microsoft Word and Google Docs, or use a visual editor for real time, in-context page editing.
Instantly create on-brand copy and image variations, test performance, and personalize content using integrated generative AI capabilities.
Reuse content across properties, manage metadata, and streamline translation to deliver consistent global experiences.

sections.headline: Adobe Experience Manager Sites use cases.

items.title: Accelerate website production.
items.body: Empower any team to build and publish high-quality websites with easy-to-use AI.

items.title: Scale experiences across brands and regions.
items.body: Expand web experiences across brands, regions, and languages using a shared foundation that balances consistency and local flexibility.

items.title: Deliver high-performance experiences by default.
items.body: Deliver fast, reliable web experiences without requiring ongoing manual optimization.

sections.headline: Forrester names Adobe a Leader in CMS.

sections.headline: Unlock more with Adobe integrations.
sections.description: Connect Adobe products to create experiences that are right on time and just right for your customers.

items.title: Experience Manager Sites + Adobe Experience Manager Assets
items.body: Update assets and digital content everywhere automatically, saving time for developers and marketers.

items.title: Experience Manager Sites + Adobe Commerce
items.body: Create immersive shopping experiences by enriching product pages with content, and manage both content and commerce with a single integrated system.

items.title: Experience Manager Sites + Adobe Analytics
items.body: Fuel content with real-time, omnichannel insights for better optimization and to make each customer interaction relevant.
